channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Alberta voter database leak raises long-term security and political concerns
item.description: A recent leak of Alberta's provincial voter list, which contains nearly three million names, addresses, and phone numbers, has prompted warnings from security and law enforcement experts about serious...

item.title: Understanding the Root Causes of Road Rage in South Africa
item.description: Road rage in South Africa is more than just frustration behind the wheel – it reflects deep-seated societal issues such as stress, inequality, and normalised violence. The recent fatal shooting in Joh...

item.title: MP Provides Water Pipes to Improve Access for Toroha Secondary School Students
item.description: Students at Toroha Secondary School in Mwanga District, Kilimanjaro Region, are finally going to get easier access to water thanks to efforts by their local Member of Parliament, Ngwaru Maghembe. For ...

item.title: Ten People Dead After School Shooting in Turkey
item.description: Dem don report say one 11-year-old pikin don die from injuries wey she get from one school shooting wey happen for southern Turkey over two weeks ago, wey don make the number of people wey don die rea...

item.title: VP Sara Duterte's camp submits evidence to refute Ramil Madriaga's claims of close relationship
item.description: The camp of Vice President Sara Duterte has submitted evidence to counter the statements made by self-confessed bagman Ramil Madriaga. Madriaga previously claimed in an affidavit that he had close tie...

item.description: The South African Health Department has assured the public that there is no cause for alarm following reports of hantavirus cases aboard the Dutch-registered cruise ship MV Hondius. The ship, which de...

item.title: Study Explores How Coffee Affects Gut Microbiome, Mood, and Inflammation
item.description: A recent study published in Nature Communications investigates how regular coffee consumption influences the gut-brain axis, revealing that its health effects extend well beyond caffeine. Researchers ...

item.title: IHC Upholds Lease Cancellation of One Constitution Avenue, Investors Directed to Appropriate Forums

item.description: Dar es Salaam – As Tanzania’s economy continues to grow, experts are warning that managing personal and business wealth is becoming a significant challenge. With GDP expected to reach about $95 billio...

item.title: Suspect in Peter Kay show bomb hoax removed from court after disruptive behaviour

item.title: US Coach Austin Pillado Leads 10-Day Elite Swimming Camp in Dar es Salaam
item.description: Dar es Salaam has welcomed US swimming coach Austin Pillado for a 10-day high-performance training camp at Monti International School. The camp, running from May 4 to May 14, brings together over 100 ...

item.title: Rising Costs Are Making Modern Dating Increasingly Inaccessible
item.description: The article argues that while dating apps are often blamed for modern dating frustrations, the deeper issue in 2026 is economic: many people simply cannot afford to date. Surveys show that financial p...

item.title: Volonaut Unveils Jet-Powered Single-Rider Airbike Capable of 200 km/h
item.description: Polish inventor Tomasz Patan has introduced the Volonaut Airbike, a compact flying vehicle that closely resembles the iconic speeder bikes from Star Wars. Recently revealed after operating in stealth ...

item.title: Key factors driving viral content across East African audiences
item.description: This article explains that content virality in East Africa is not just luck or high production quality, but mainly about how well the content connects with local people. In countries like Tanzania, Ke...

item.description: This editorial highlights a significant diplomatic moment for Tanzania as it hosts Rwanda’s President Paul Kagame and prepares to receive Kenya’s President William Ruto. The visits are presented as a ...

item.title: Human Rights Tribunal Decisions Highlight Different Treatment of Trans and Cisgender Women
item.description: The B.C. Human Rights Tribunal recently faced scrutiny over its handling of complaints from a biological woman, referred to as J, and a trans-identifying inmate, Makayla Sandve. J, who had experienced...

item.title: May fuel price hikes to strain South African households
item.description: South African consumers are facing significant financial pressure this May as the Department of Mineral and Petroleum Resources (DMPR) announced notable increases in fuel prices. Petrol will rise by R...

item.title: KKR spinners set up victory as Raghuvanshi and Rahane guide chase in IPL 2026
